description:
Patience has its own rewards.  

Added a variation move 11 -- not sure if my assessment of "rightness" is valid.  Would welcome comments
sgf:
(;GM[1]FF[4]CA[UTF-8]AP[CGoban:2]ST[2]
RU[Japanese]SZ[19]KM[0.00]
PW[White]PB[Black]AB[do]LB[dq:A]C[This is the lead in.  Please play the marked moves]PL[W]
;W[dq]CR[dq]
;B[cq]LB[cr:A]CR[cq]
;W[cr]CR[cr]
;B[cp]LB[er:A]CR[cp]
;W[er]CR[er]
;B[fq]LB[ep:A]CR[fq]C[Black plays hamete.  Play at A to keep from getting fenced in.]
;W[ep]CR[ep]
;B[fo]CR[fo]C[The problem now starts.  How does White handle the situation?]
(;W[eo]CR[eo]
;B[en]CR[en]
;W[fp]CR[fp]
;B[gp]CR[gp]
(;W[go]CR[go]
;B[eq]CR[eq]
;W[fn]CR[fn]
;B[dp]CR[dp]C[White got greedy and is now caught])
(;W[gq]CR[gq]
;B[go]CR[go]
;W[hq]CR[hq]
;B[dm]LB[eq:B][gq:A]CR[dm]C[RIGHT ends in an inferior position for Black.  White playing at A was patient and prevents black from playing at B]))
(;W[fp]CR[fp]
;B[gp]CR[gp]
(;W[eo]CR[eo]
;B[en]CR[en]
(;W[go]CR[go]
;B[eq]CR[eq]
;W[fn]CR[fn]
;B[dp]CR[dp]C[White got greedy and is now caught])
(;W[gq]CR[gq]
;B[go]CR[go]
;W[hq]CR[hq]
;B[dm]LB[eq:B][gq:A]CR[dm]C[RIGHT ends in an inferior position for Black.  White playing at A was patient and prevents black from playing at B]))
(;W[gq]CR[gq]
;B[eo]CR[eo]
(;W[hq]CR[hq]
;B[go]CR[go]C[white gets out but black has built influence])
(;W[hp]CR[hp]
;B[go]CR[go]
;W[hq]CR[hq]
;B[ho]CR[ho]C[white gets out but black has built influence]))))
